notes: source has memory-aware guard; explicit VMLX_VLM_IMAGE_PREFILL_BUFFER_GB=8 still preserves old low cap by user choice
installed app must be rebuilt/released from this source before affected users stop seeing the old fixed 8GB behavior
this proof covers guard policy only, not full Gemma 4 VL answer quality

reported_failure: Gemma 4 12B image prompt rejected because predicted attention buffer 10.0GB exceeded fixed 8.0GB guard on a 128GB M5 Max

source_behavior.detail: VLM image prefill budget ok: seq_len=12953, heads=32, predicted_attention=10.0GB

verification.command: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_vl_video_regression.py -k 'vlm_image_prefill_default_single_buffer_guard_scales_on_high_memory or vlm_image_prefill_explicit_single_buffer_guard_preserves_old_limit or vmlx156_simple_mllm_guard_uses_media_expanded_input_ids or simple_mllm_guard'
